title: Blueprint Swarm - Account Health
description: Account health scoring and risk assessment across the entire portfolio based on call intelligence

risk_score.description: Risk score from 0 (no risk) to 100 (imminent churn). Calculated from warning signal density, sentiment trajectory, champion engagement, and competitive pressure.

risk_level.description: Risk level derived from risk_score: critical (75-100), high (50-74), medium (25-49), low (0-24)

signal.description: Description of the risk or health signal (e.g., 'Champion disengaged for 60+ days', 'Competitor mentioned in last 2 calls', 'Expanding usage - added 3 new seats')

severity.description: Severity of the signal — critical and warning increase risk; info is neutral; positive decreases risk

evidence.description: Specific evidence from calls supporting this signal

signals.description: All health signals for this account, both positive and negative

action.description: Specific recommended action (e.g., 'Schedule executive check-in within 7 days', 'Identify and develop secondary champion')

rationale.description: Why this action is recommended based on the signals

recommended_actions.description: Prioritized list of recommended actions for this account

last_activity.description: Date of the most recent call or interaction (YYYY-MM-DD)

call_count.description: Total number of calls analyzed for this account

accounts.description: All accounts with health scores, sorted by risk_score descending (highest risk first)
